L. 96–294, title VI, § 60194 Stat. 763June 30, 1980“This title [enacting this chapter and sections 1146 and 1147 of this title and amending sections 1141 and 1143 of this title and sections 796, 824a–3, 824i, and 824j of Title 16, Conservation] may be cited as the ‘Geothermal Energy Act of 1980’.”

children.text: domestic geothermal reserves can be developed into regionally significant energy sources promoting the economic health and national security of the Nation;
there are institutional and economic barriers to the commercialization of geothermal technology; and
Federal agencies should consider the use of geothermal energy in the Government’s buildings.
